name: shipinfabu-duty-health-check
description: Repo-managed bootstrap workflow that runs the shipinfabu duty-mode health check without creating clean-publish jobs.

steps.name: duty_health_check
steps.prompt_template: Enter duty mode. Run exactly one helper bridge health-check against the current shipinfabu runtime. Do not create, retry, or mutate any clean-publish business job. Return a concise operator report with: 1) overall health, 2) failing components if any, 3) immediate next action. Extra context: {{input}}
